global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with product displays and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock items at a sale price.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A simple logo positioned at the top, featuring the text 'VantaStyle' in a bold font.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Three rectangular shapes resembling product images, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Limited stock Only this weekend' in a prominent font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: SALE announcement

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A button at the bottom center with the text 'Watch now' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.description: Text displaying the price '€9.99' in a noticeable font, located at the bottom left.
